content_body: Sitting on over 200 acres with panoramic mountain views, Roo Mountain Vineyards is North Georgia's newest winery! This stunning establishment boasts 12,000 square feet, a rooftop garden, an indoor tasting room, and a barrel room to explore while you sip one of their wines or ciders. Come for the wine. Stay for the experience.
title: Roo Mountain Vineyards
